text: Really smooth onboarding experience, love the new layout!
Feature works as expected, no complaints.
Good update overall, the dashboard feels cleaner.
Setup was easy, got started in under 2 minutes.
Nothing special but it works fine.
Loving the new feature, it saves me so much time.
Solid update. Performance seems the same as before.
App crashed three times in one hour after the update. Unusable.
Everything is so slow now. Pages take forever to load.
Payment failed twice. Had to use a different app to complete my purchase.
Crash on startup every single time. Please fix this ASAP.
The new feature looks interesting but the app keeps freezing.
I submitted a support ticket 6 hours ago, still no response.
Works fine on my end, maybe it's a specific device issue?
Three of my colleagues are having the same crash problem.
API calls are timing out constantly. This is breaking our integration.
Cancelled my subscription because of the instability. Very disappointed.
The crash happens specifically when I try to access the new dashboard.
Loading times went from 1 second to 10+ seconds. What happened?
Payment processing is broken. Lost a sale because of this.
I don't mind the slowness too much, but the crashes are unacceptable.
Support team finally responded but couldn't resolve my issue.
Still crashing. Has anyone from the team even looked at this?
Rolled back to the old version on my end. Much more stable.
This update broke everything. Worst release I have seen in years.
API latency is still terrible on day 3. No communication from the team.
My payment went through fine today, maybe it was a temporary issue.
The new feature itself is great, shame the performance ruined the launch.
Uninstalled. Three days of crashes is three days too many.
